package rulefixtures

// scenario for malformed_struct_tag: Struct field tags that do not parse as valid Go tag key/value pairs.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: consistency; severity: contextual.
type Rule230PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario230Positive(records []Rule230PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
